title: onobrychis reuteri
intro: Onobrychis reuteri, also known as saponin-rich sainfoin, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family, primarily found in the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which are attributed to its saponin content. The health benefits of Onobrychis reuteri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Onobrychis reuteri can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
